title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click while enabling customization through built-in control plane and data plane management. It includes automatic scaling via Karpenter node pools, cost optimization, and support for AI workloads including inference and training scenarios.
